top3.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE 
-- Generate all months from the earliest to latest transaction month
all_months AS (
    SELECT MIN(strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date)) AS month_start
    FROM customer_transactions
    UNION ALL
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date(month_start, '+1 month'))
    FROM all_months
    WHERE month_start < (SELECT MAX(strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date)) FROM customer_transactions)
),
-- Get all distinct customers
all_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM customer_transactions
),
-- Cross...

    FROM customer_transactions
    UNION ALL
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date(month_start, '+1 month'))
    FROM all_months
    WHERE month_start < (SELECT MAX(strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date)) FROM customer_transactions)
),
-- Get all distinct customers
all_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM customer_transactions
),
-- Cross...

WITH RECURSIVE 
-- Generate all months spanning the transaction history
month_series AS (
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', MIN(txn_date)) AS month_val
    FROM customer_transactions
    UNION ALL
    SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date(month_val, '+1 month'))
    FROM month_series
    WHERE month_val < (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', MAX(txn_date)) FROM customer_transactions)
),
-- Get unique customers
customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM customer_transactions
),
-- Create full customer-month gri...
